privileged_info_summary: The task involves a physician-to-physician internal communication within Oscar EMR, a containerized open-source Canadian electronic medical record system. The sender is Dr. Sarah Chen (provider_no 999998) logging in via the oscardoc user account with password 'oscar' and PIN 1117. The message is directed to Dr. James Wilson (provider_no 100001, specialty Cardiology). The message subject is 'Cardiology Referral Discussion - Margaret Thompson' and the body discusses a patient presenting with exertional dyspnea and intermittent chest tightness over 3 weeks, with ECG showing non-specific ST changes. All data (provider records, patient information, credentials) is synthetically generated for the task environment.
